title: Data Sources
description: Data Sources manages the configuration and registration of clinical databases connected to the Parthenon platform. Administrators can register CDM-conformant sources, configure connection parameters, and monitor source availability to ensure researchers have reliable access to the data they need.
tips: Verify CDM version compatibility before registering a new data source to prevent downstream analysis errors.
Use the Source Profiler to generate an inventory of available data domains and record counts after initial source registration.
Apply descriptive naming conventions to data sources so researchers can clearly identify the population and time period covered.
Schedule periodic data refresh jobs and monitor them via the Jobs Monitoring panel to keep source data current.
Restrict data source configuration to authorized administrators and audit changes via the platform Audit Log.
